planner.description: Converts feature requests into dependency-resolved task lists. No code. Flags risk.

coder.description: Implements approved tasks with minimal diff. Enforces Decimal currency and service boundaries.

reviewer.description: Pre-screens PRs against architecture, security, and test coverage. Never approves.

security.description: Django/DRF security specialist. Reviews secrets, auth, CSRF, CORS, and data-at-rest.

test-writer.description: QA specialist. Test-first discipline. Writes pytest tests with happy path, invalid input, and edge cases.

docs-agent.description: Technical writer. Generates living documentation from source code.
